scripts.smoke:flow:all: npm run smoke:flow && npm run smoke:flow:deep
scripts.smoke:runtime:hybrid: node --input-type=module -e "const base=process.env.BENYUAN_BASE_URL??'http://localhost:3000'; const res=await fetch(base + '/api/analysis/runtime?mode=deep&engine=hybrid'); const data=await res.json(); if(!data.runtime.fallbackActive) throw new Error('expected fallback'); console.log(JSON.stringify(data.runtime));"
